hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if runner-stability cards can treat `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health` only as trailing observability after the full replayable runner evidence trail, not as a mid-stream proof step.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` accepted runner-stability cards whose `evidence_commands` inserted `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health` between replayable runner scripts, so passive observability could split the replayable proof trail and still verify clean. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any runner-stability card that places `claw:health` before the last replayable runner evidence command, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if runner-stability cards can use `claw:health` only after all replayable runner script commands and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Runner-stability observability must stay trailing after the full replayable evidence trail; allowing `claw:health` mid-sequence weakens closed-fail recovery proof.
